task.title: Decouple closed-task retention from projection rebuild
task.summary: Closed-task retention no longer depends on generated projection rebuilds; refresh=false close path preserves archive retention.

goal.outcome: Closing tasks can enforce roadmap archive retention through the canonical task mutation path without depending on rebuild side effects.
acceptance: Task close with closed_task_limit=0 archives the closed task even when projection refresh is false.
Generated projection rebuild remains available and does not become the only retention mechanism.
Smoke coverage verifies archive retention for refresh=false or equivalent minimal-write close path.

delta.desired: Retention belongs to canonical roadmap mutation; generated projection rebuilds are no longer required for correct archive preservation.
delta.current: Roadmap archive retention is enforced by rebuild, so codewiki_task keeps refresh=true by default for compatibility.
delta.closure: Task close retention is implemented in extension code and covered by smoke tests.
